popularStory.headline: en.Wikipedia Stephen, King of England
popularStory.description: Stephen (1092 or 1096 – 25 October 1154), often referred to as Stephen of Blois, was King of England from 22 December 1135 to his death in 1154. A younger son of the Count of Blois, he was Count of Bo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre於1095年5月10日出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux50歲，母親Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois32歲。他和Mathilde de Boulogne至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1154年11月1日在英國英格蘭肯特多福享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Étienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

en.lifeSummary: When Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre was born on 10 May 1095, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, was 50 and his mother, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, was 32. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Mathilde de Boulogne. He died on 1 November 1154, in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre est né le 10 mai 1095, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Mathilde de Boulogne. Il est décédé le 1 novembre 1154, à Dover, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Faversham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre am 10. Mai 1095 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux 50 und seine Mutter Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois 32. Er hatte mit Mathilde de Boulogne mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. November 1154 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre è nato il il 10 maggio 1095 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Mathilde de Boulogne. Morì il 1 novembre 1154, nel Dover, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Faversham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre(이)가 1095년 5월 10일 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Mathilde de Boulogne(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1154년 11월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 도버에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre nasceu em 10 de maio de 1095, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Mathilde de Boulogne. Ele faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1154, em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Edmunds Abbey, Bury, Suffolk, Engl: ст эдмунд'с чурч, меидс моретон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre родился 10 мая 1095 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, 32. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Mathilde de Boulogne. Он умер 1 ноября 1154 г. в местности довир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre nació el 10 de mayo de 1095, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Mathilde de Boulogne. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1154, en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
